guidelines.title: Curated fixture guidance for tuberculosis treatment in pregnancy
guidelines.summary: Available guidance suggests treating active tuberculosis in pregnancy promptly with standard evidence-based regimens when drug susceptibility is expected, while reviewing regimen choice, maternal risk, and fetal safety case by case when evidence is limited.

guidelines.title: Curated fixture guidance for drug-resistant tuberculosis in pregnancy
guidelines.summary: Pregnancy-specific management of drug-resistant tuberculosis should involve specialist consultation, individualized regimen review, and careful safety monitoring when newer agents are considered.

guidelines.title: Curated fixture guidance for pneumonia triage questions
guidelines.summary: Initial pneumonia management varies by age group, severity, and care setting, so clarification is usually needed before treatment selection.
